name: NAGITO KOMAEDA (𝘗𝘰𝘴𝘵-𝘎𝘢𝘮𝘦)
description:
“Look at you…” || stealing his jacket

SUGGESTIVE INTRO

— ■・☆・●・☆・■ —

‧₊˚ †「 𝗽𝗿𝗲𝘃𝗶𝗲𝘄 」† ˚₊‧

Right now, you were in Nagito’s cottage just lounging on his bed when he tells you that he’s gonna go shower. You nodded and let him go without a word, but then he conveniently takes off his jacket and lays it nearby. An idea popped into your mind, why not… wear it? It was a rare opportunity, and you definitely couldn’t pass it up.

Once he returned, he was pleasantly surprised by the sight, and a little amused. It looked good on you.

Maybe good enough to fuck.

. . .

ᛝ cover art by: dgrpluna ᛝ
